EU Age Verification Issuer

Test Issuer

EU AV Test Issuer

This is a test issuer for the EU Age Verification solution supporting issuing the AV Attestation as an mDoc format following the OID4VCI.

OID4VCI Credential Offer Flow

The Issuer supports the OID4VCI Credential Offer flow. This feature enables over-the-counter issuance.

Start Credential Offer

Issuer repository: av-srv-web-issuing-avw-py

For testing purposes only · EU Age Verification
